name: Incline Dumbbell Press
description: Sit on an incline bench and press the dumbbells upward from the sides of your chest, then lower them slowly with control. Targets the upper chest muscles.

name: Overhead Shoulder Press
description: Stand or sit and press the bar upward from shoulder level until your arms are fully extended. A main exercise for the front and side deltoids and triceps.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and raise your arms to the sides until shoulder level, then lower them slowly. Builds and strengthens the side deltoids.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Sit at the machine, grip the bar with a wide grip, pull it down in front of your face to chin level, then return slowly. A fundamental exercise for the upper back.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
description: Bend forward slightly with knees bent and pull the bar toward your abdomen while keeping your back straight. Strengthens the middle and lower back muscles.

name: Barbell Curl
description: Hold the bar with a shoulder-width grip and curl it upward with control without moving your elbows. A primary exercise for building biceps size.

name: Hammer Curl
description: Hold the dumbbells with a neutral grip and curl them up to shoulder level, then lower slowly. Targets the biceps and brachialis muscles.

name: Triceps Pushdown
description: Hold the rope or handle on the cable machine and push it downward until your arms are fully extended, then return slowly. Excellent for strengthening the triceps.

name: Overhead Dumbbell Extension
description: Hold one dumbbell with both hands overhead, lower it behind your head, then extend your arms upward. Targets the long head of the triceps.
